not been established, the entities’ names are being used instead. 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_ENT_NAME 

LONG NAME: HLTH_HOME_ENT_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 100 

FILE(S): Health home and state plan options 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: The field can contain any alphanumeric characters, digits, or symbols. 

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown
